commands_run: coord join && coord claim "android live active sample receipt"
adb shell input tap 720 1458 && adb shell input text 'http://192.168.0.7:8800'

curl -sS --max-time 2 http://localhost:8800/state | jq '{frames, present, latest: {mic_rms: .latest.mic_rms, camera_luma: .latest.camera_luma, camera_samples: .latest.camera_samples, gpu_pixel: .latest.gpu_pixel, gpu_samples: .latest.gpu_samples, gpu_latency_ms: .latest.gpu_latency_ms, sample_count: .latest.body_state.sample_count, organs_active: .latest.organs_active}, checks, challenger: .challenger, chal_agree, chal_checks}'
failure_reason: Installed the current Coherence Sense debug APK on the authorized SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a device, entered the Mac witness URL manually after mDNS discovery stayed pending, and captured the first live active-sample witness receipt. localhost:8800/state reported present=true, frames=141, nonzero mic_rms=0.007045886313547694, nonzero camera_luma=0.02805499733188006, camera_samples=2367, gpu_pixel=-13614897, gpu_samples=99, gpu_latency_ms=1.412917, body_state.sample_count=5084, checks=136, chal_agree=138, chal_checks=138, and active organs including camera, gpu, and mic. Existing Python receipt helper wrote capability/liveness JSON but does not yet export live witness counters, so this slice records the live counter proof in durable docs/evidence and leaves Form-native witness-state export as the next gap.

commands: coord join && coord claim "android live active sample receipt"
adb shell input tap 720 1458 && adb shell input text 'http://192.168.0.7:8800'

curl -sS --max-time 2 http://localhost:8800/state | jq '{frames, present, latest: {mic_rms: .latest.mic_rms, camera_luma: .latest.camera_luma, camera_samples: .latest.camera_samples, gpu_pixel: .latest.gpu_pixel, gpu_samples: .latest.gpu_samples, gpu_latency_ms: .latest.gpu_latency_ms, sample_count: .latest.body_state.sample_count, organs_active: .latest.organs_active}, checks, challenger: .challenger, chal_agree, chal_checks}'
